How I built this site from scratch

February 28, 2026

Why I Made This Site!

I have had wanted to make my website ever since I was kid! Back in 2010 I believe I have had made my own website going from wix.com to weebly.com.

Then in 2017, by the time I hit High School and I was taking web development classes thats when I started “coding” my own website and begin hosting it on Repl.it, other free website hosting websites and now I moved towards github. Honestly, before using github to host my website, I used to infinityfree and instead of using HTML i used PHP which was better in my pure opinion but recently i think that has changed when i moved to Github.

But I also made this site because I wanted to allow my viewers and even my friends to see my socials and also any updates that I be having like how I feel or how I be doing stuff in my daily bases. And also allow people to watch my past streams that I be uploading to YouTube vod channel which I do actually enjoy doing on my free time.

How I Made This Site?

I use VS Code Studio and only using the languages HTML and CSS, I might start eventually use javascript but at the moment is only HTML and CSS. I usually spend around 2 hours everyday on working the website and add new things either its new blogs or new page or even adding in streams and better features to enchance users experiences and my friends or my stream viewers will tell me what features I need to add and remove.

there are times where I will also be making the website on stream and sometimes people will see the workflow on how this whole website works and like I said they will give suggestions about how do certain things which is very nice of chat to do. Boom, now I had the best website……That I have ever made in my entire life and it looks so much better than my old website if I don’t say so myself.
